calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Lee Batara.
Petitioners, Jenny Y. Espinoza and Wilmer Paz the parents present in pro per for the minor; Junior Alexander Paz Espinoza, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name of the minor to Wilmer Alexander Paz Espinoza.
Decree signed in open court.
